base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of attract_screen_push_start_us_1p — a ui from 1980 pac man. USA 'BONUS PAC-MAN' variant — same as jp_1p but 'PAC-MAN' + '© 1980 MIDWAY MFG. CO.'. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: USA 'BONUS PAC-MAN' variant — same as jp_1p but 'PAC-MAN' + '© 1980 MIDWAY MFG. CO.'
